'''Neil Budworth''' (born 10 March 1982) is a former [[Wales national rugby league team|Wales]] international [[rugby league]] [[rugby football|footballer]] who finished his career playing for the [[Mackay Cutters]].<ref name="Profile at loverugbyleague.com"/><ref name="Statistics at rugbyleagueproject.org"/>

==Background==
Budworth was born in [[Higher End]], [[Metropolitan Borough of Wigan|Wigan]], [[Greater Manchester]], England.

==Career==
He previously played for the [[London Broncos#1994–2005: Broncos and Super League|London Broncos]]/[[London Broncos#2006–2011: Harlequins Rugby League|Harlequins RL]] in the [[Super League]] competition and was one of their longest serving players. He also played for the [[Crusaders Rugby League|Crusaders RL]] in National League One and the Super League as a {{rlp|hk}}.
